<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by /forge:init — confidence: 95% -->
# Stack Checklist

Review items to check on every implementation task. Engineers and Supervisors
consult this before approving any change to `forge/`.

## Node.js / JavaScript

- [ ] No npm dependencies introduced — plugin uses Node.js built-ins only
- [ ] New `.js` / `.cjs` files use `'use strict';` and include `process.on('uncaughtException', () => process.exit(0))` in hooks (or `process.exit(1)` in utilities)
- [ ] All hooks exit 0 on failure — never surface noise to the user

## Plugin Distribution

- [ ] Any material change bumps the version in `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- [ ] Migration entry added to `forge/migrations.json` with correct `regenerate` targets
- [ ] `breaking: true` and `manual` steps populated if the change requires user action before regenerating

## Security

- [ ] Security scan run before pushing: `/security-watchdog:scan-plugin forge:forge`
- [ ] Scan report saved to `docs/security/scan-v{VERSION}.md`
- [ ] README security table updated with new row

## Schema Changes

- [ ] New store fields added to the relevant `forge/schemas/*.schema.json`
- [ ] `additionalProperties: false` preserved in schemas (no drift)
- [ ] `validate-store.cjs --dry-run` passes against the project's own store
- [ ] New required fields have a `--fix` backfill rule in validate-store.cjs (BUG-003)
- [ ] Foreign keys that can be null are listed in `NULLABLE_FK` set (BUG-002)
- [ ] Referential integrity checks cover all ID namespaces (tasks, bugs, virtual sprint dirs) (BUG-002)

## Command / Workflow Changes

- [ ] Frontmatter `description` accurately reflects what the command does (no mismatch)
- [ ] No prompt injection patterns in any Markdown instruction file
- [ ] On-error footer present in all command files

## Tools (CJS)

- [ ] Top-level `try/catch` with `process.exit(1)` wrapping all tool logic
- [ ] `--dry-run` flag supported where writes are performed
- [ ] Tool reads `.forge/config.json` for paths rather than hardcoding
